question: Under Article 28 of the Korean Rules on the Structure and Facility Standards of Roads, the lane cross slope is set for drainage by pavement type — what cross-slope applies to asphalt-concrete and cement-concrete pavements?

ground_truth.value: Lane cross slope provided for drainage by pavement type; asphalt-concrete and cement-concrete pavements 1.5%–2.0%.
ground_truth.quote: 차로의 횡단경사는 배수를 위하여 포장의 종류에 따라

candidates.label: A
candidates.answer: Art. 28: lane cross slope for asphalt-/cement-concrete pavements is 1.5% to 2.0%.

candidates.label: C
candidates.answer: NOT FOUND IN PASSAGES (system reported no answer)

candidates.label: D
candidates.answer: NOT FOUND IN PASSAGES (system reported no answer)

candidates.label: E
candidates.answer: Art. 28: lane cross slope for asphalt-/cement-concrete pavements is 1.5% to 2.0%.
